Container.Name: Floe-Server
Container.Overview: Signaling server for the Floe encrypted peer-to-peer file transfer app. Install this template before Floe-Client. File data does not pass through this server.[br][br]Set Client URL to the exact browser origin of Floe-Client, including its scheme and host port.

Config.Name: Signaling Port
Config.Description: Host port used by Floe-Client to reach the signaling server.

Config.Name: Client URL
Config.Description: Required. Exact Floe-Client browser origin, for example http://192.168.1.10:3000. This controls the server CORS allow-list.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxy Count
Config.Description: Use 0 for direct LAN access. Set the number of reverse-proxy hops when publishing through a proxy.

Config.Name: Maximum Connections Per IP
Config.Description: Maximum new signaling connections per IP per 60 seconds.

Config.Name: Cloudflare TURN Key ID
Config.Description: Optional Cloudflare Realtime TURN Token ID.

Config.Name: Cloudflare TURN API Token
Config.Description: Optional API token paired with the Cloudflare TURN Key ID.

Config.Name: Self-hosted TURN Secret
Config.Description: Optional coturn HMAC secret. Must match static-auth-secret in coturn.

Config.Name: Self-hosted TURN Domain
Config.Description: Optional public hostname for a separate coturn relay.

Config.Name: Upstash Redis REST URL
Config.Description: Optional REST URL for durable aggregate transfer statistics.

Config.Name: Upstash Redis REST Token
Config.Description: Optional read-write REST token paired with the Upstash URL.
